description: The flight search results page is in a loading state, displaying a progress spinner and rotating airline logos including Air Canada, Air New Zealand, ANA, and Etihad Airways.
frame_description: A red and white loading screen with the message 'Our overhead compartments are stuffed with deals!' and a blue circular progress indicator.

description: The loading screen clears and the 'Select Departing Flight' results page becomes visible, showing flight options from Sydney to Melbourne.
frame_description: The flight search results interface with filters on the left and flight listings for Qantas and Virgin Australia.
